summary: CRO Board Testing Complete - Backend 100% (18/18), Frontend 100% UI verified. Fixed minor UI bug in stage filter dropdown. All CRO features working: dashboard metrics, project stages, create project dialog, filters, tabs, submit workflow.

fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused runtime error
fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' with proper conversion logic

seed_data_creation: Used existing packages: Basic Package (A), VALUE FOR MONEY (B), TEST_E2E Package (E2E). Created test projects with TEST_ prefix for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRO Board fully functional. Stage filter dropdown fix applied. All 8 project stages display correctly (Drawing, Yet to Start, Foundation, Basement, SS-Brick Work, SS-Plastering, Finishing, Handover). Project codes auto-generated in USB{serial}{month}{year} format (e.g., USB070226).
